metadata.description: A portable marketplace for shared Codex and Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: starter-tools
plugins.description: Demo skills and agents for implementation planning and code review.

plugins.name: common
plugins.description: Shared common Quality Engineering skills packaged with a marketplace smoke-test agent.

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: Functional testing and data quality placeholders for marketplace import validation.

plugins.name: aqa
plugins.description: Automated testing placeholders for Playwright and API marketplace import validation.

plugins.name: perf
plugins.description: Performance testing placeholders for k6 and baseline marketplace import validation.

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Security testing placeholders for OWASP and threat-model marketplace import validation.

plugins.name: a11y
plugins.description: Accessibility placeholders for WCAG and keyboard-flow marketplace import validation.

plugins.name: domain
plugins.description: Platform-specific domain testing placeholders for SAP and Salesforce marketplace validation.
